'''еЈ¬з”і'''пјҲгҒҝгҒҡгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢгҖҒгҒҳгӮ“гҒ—гӮ“пјүгҒҜгҖҒ[[е№Іж”Ҝ]]гҒ®дёҖгҒӨгҖӮ
[[з”Іеӯҗ]]гҒӢгӮүж•°гҒҲгҒҰ9з•Әзӣ®гҒ§гҖҒеүҚгҒҜ[[иҫӣжңӘ]]гҖҒж¬ЎгҒҜ[[зҷёй…ү]]гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ[[еҚҒе№І]]гҒ®[[дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|дә”иЎҢ]]гҒҜж°ҙгҖҒ[[еҚҒдәҢж”Ҝ]]гҒ®дә”иЎҢгҒҜйҮ‘гҒ§гҖҒ[[дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі#зӣёз”ҹ|зӣёз”ҹ]]пјҲйҮ‘з”ҹж°ҙпјүгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ
==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®е№ҙ==
==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—Ҙ== ===[[йҒёж—Ҙ]]=== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒҜ[[зҠҜеңҹ|еӨ§еңҹ]]гҒ®3ж—Ҙзӣ®гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ

{{е№Іж”Ҝ}} {{дёӯиҸҜеңҸгҒ®дәӢзү© |гӮҝгӮӨгғҲгғ« = еЈ¬з”і |з”»еғҸзЁ®еҲҘ = |з”»еғҸ = |з”»еғҸгҒ®иӘ¬жҳҺ = |з№ҒдҪ“еӯ— = еЈ¬з”і |з°ЎдҪ“еӯ— = еЈ¬з”і |гғ”гғійҹі = rГ©nshД“n |йҖҡз”Ёгғ”гғійҹі = |жіЁйҹіз¬ҰеҸ· = г„–г„ЈЛҠг„•г„Ј |гғ©гғҶгғіеӯ— = |гӮ«гӮҝгӮ«гғҠ = гғ¬гғігӮ·гӮ§гғјгғі |жјўйҹіиӘӯгҒҝ = гҒҳгӮ“гҒ—гӮ“ |ж…Јз”ЁиӘӯгҒҝ = гҒҝгҒҡгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ
гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn}} }} '''еЈ¬з”і'''пјҲгҒҝгҒҡгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢгҖҒгҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢгҖҒгҒҳгӮ“гҒ—гӮ“пјүгҒҜгҖҒ[[е№Іж”Ҝ]]гҒ®дёҖгҒӨгҖӮ е№Іж”ҜгҒ®зө„гҒҝеҗҲгӮҸгҒӣгҒ®9з•Әзӣ®гҒ§гҖҒеүҚгҒҜ[[иҫӣжңӘ]]гҖҒж¬ЎгҒҜ[[зҷёй…ү]]гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ[[йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢ]]гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒ[[еҚҒе№І]]гҒ®[[еЈ¬]]гҒҜйҷҪгҒ®[[ж°ҙ]]гҖҒ[[еҚҒдәҢж”Ҝ]]гҒ®[[з”і]]гҒҜйҷҪгҒ®[[йҮ‘]]гҒ§гҖҒ [[дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі#зӣёз”ҹпјҲгҒқгҒҶгҒ—гӮҮгҒҶпјү|зӣёз”ҹ]]пјҲйҮ‘з”ҹж°ҙпјүгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®е№ҙ== [[иҘҝжҡҰ]]е№ҙгӮ’60гҒ§еүІгҒЈгҒҰ12гҒҢдҪҷгӮӢе№ҙгҒҢеЈ¬з”ігҒ®[[е№ҙ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮ {| class="wikitable" |+'''еЈ¬з”ігҒ®е№ҙ''' |- ![[1еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]]!![[2еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]]!![[3еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]] |- | *[[12е№ҙ]] *[[72е№ҙ]] *[[132е№ҙ]] *[[192е№ҙ]] *[[252е№ҙ]] *[[312е№ҙ]] *[[372е№ҙ]] *[[432е№ҙ]] *[[492е№ҙ]] *[[552е№ҙ]] *[[612е№ҙ]] *[[672е№ҙ]] *[[732е№ҙ]] *[[792е№ҙ]] *[[852е№ҙ]] *[[912е№ҙ]] *[[972е№ҙ]] | *[[1032е№ҙ]] *[[1092е№ҙ]] *[[1152е№ҙ]] *[[1212е№ҙ]] *[[1272е№ҙ]] *[[1332е№ҙ]] *[[1392е№ҙ]] *[[1452е№ҙ]] *[[1512е№ҙ]] *[[1572е№ҙ]] *[[1632е№ҙ]] *[[1692е№ҙ]] *[[1752е№ҙ]] *[[1812е№ҙ]] *[[1872е№ҙ]] *[[1932е№ҙ]] *[[1992е№ҙ]] | *[[2052е№ҙ]] *[[2112е№ҙ]] *[[2172е№ҙ]] *[[2232е№ҙ]] *[[2292е№ҙ]] *[[2352е№ҙ]] *[[2412е№ҙ]] *[[2472е№ҙ]] *[[2532е№ҙ]] *[[2592е№ҙ]] *[[2652е№ҙ]] *[[2712е№ҙ]] *[[2772е№ҙ]] *[[2832е№ҙ]] *[[2892е№ҙ]] *[[2952е№ҙ]] |} ===еҮәжқҘдәӢ=== *[[еӨ©жҷәеӨ©зҡҮ]]11е№ҙпјҲ672е№ҙпјү - [[еЈ¬з”ігҒ®д№ұ]]гҖӮ *[[жҳҺжІ»]]5е№ҙпјҲ1872е№ҙпјүгҒ«з·ЁиЈҪгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжҲёзұҚгҒҜ[[еЈ¬з”іжҲёзұҚ]]гҒЁе‘јгҒ°гӮҢгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®жңҲ== иҘҝжҡҰе№ҙгҒ®дёӢ1жЎҒгҒҢ4гғ»9пјҲеҚҒе№ІгҒҢ[[з”І]]гғ»[[е·ұ]]пјүгҒ®е№ҙгҒ®[[7жңҲ]]гҒҢеЈ¬з”ігҒ®[[жңҲ (жҡҰ)|жңҲ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮгҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҒ“гҒ“гҒ§гҒ„гҒҶжңҲгҒҜгҖҒ[[ж—§жҡҰ]]гҒ®жңҲгӮ„[[зҜҖжңҲ]]пјҲ[[з«Ӣз§Ӣ]]гҒӢгӮү[[зҷҪйңІ]]гҒ®еүҚж—ҘгҒҫгҒ§пјүгӮ’йҒ©з”ЁгҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲгӮӮгҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—Ҙ== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒ®[[йҒёж—Ҙ]]гҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®йҖҡгӮҠгҖӮ ===йҒёж—Ҙ=== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒҜ[[зҠҜеңҹ|еӨ§еңҹ]]гҒ®3ж—Ҙзӣ®гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”іжҷӮ== 16жҷӮгҒӢгӮү18жҷӮгҒҫгҒ§гӮ’жҢҮгҒҷгҖӮ ==й–ўйҖЈй …зӣ®== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:гҒҝгҒҷгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ}} [[Category:е№Іж”Ҝ]]

[[еЈ¬з”ігҒ®д№ұ]]гҖӮ *[[жҳҺжІ»]]5е№ҙпјҲ1872е№ҙпјүгҒ«з·ЁиЈҪгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжҲёзұҚгҒҜ[[еЈ¬з”іжҲёзұҚ]]гҒЁе‘јгҒ°гӮҢгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®жңҲ== иҘҝжҡҰе№ҙгҒ®дёӢ1жЎҒгҒҢ4гғ»9пјҲеҚҒе№ІгҒҢ[[з”І]]гғ»[[е·ұ]]пјүгҒ®е№ҙгҒ®[[7жңҲ]]гҒҢеЈ¬з”ігҒ®[[жңҲ (жҡҰ)|жңҲ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮгҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҒ“гҒ“гҒ§гҒ„гҒҶжңҲгҒҜгҖҒ[[ж—§жҡҰ]]гҒ®жңҲгӮ„[[зҜҖжңҲ]]пјҲ[[з«Ӣз§Ӣ]]гҒӢгӮү[[зҷҪйңІ]]гҒ®еүҚж—ҘгҒҫгҒ§пјүгӮ’йҒ©з”ЁгҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲгӮӮгҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—Ҙ== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒ®[[йҒёж—Ҙ]]гҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®йҖҡгӮҠгҖӮ ===йҒёж—Ҙ=== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒҜ[[зҠҜеңҹ|еӨ§еңҹ]]гҒ®3ж—Ҙзӣ®гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”іжҷӮ== 16жҷӮгҒӢгӮү18жҷӮгҒҫгҒ§гӮ’жҢҮгҒҷгҖӮ ==й–ўйҖЈй …зӣ®== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:гҒҝгҒҷгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]][[ja:еЈ¬з”і]]

{{е№Іж”Ҝ}} {{дёӯиҸҜеңҸгҒ®дәӢзү© |гӮҝгӮӨгғҲгғ« = еЈ¬з”і |з”»еғҸзЁ®еҲҘ = |з”»еғҸ = |з”»еғҸгҒ®иӘ¬жҳҺ = |з№ҒдҪ“еӯ— = еЈ¬з”і |з°ЎдҪ“еӯ— = еЈ¬з”і |гғ”гғійҹі = rГ©nshД“n |йҖҡз”Ёгғ”гғійҹі = |жіЁйҹіз¬ҰеҸ· = г„–г„ЈЛҠг„•г„Ј |гғ©гғҶгғіеӯ— = |гӮ«гӮҝгӮ«гғҠ = гғ¬гғігӮ·гӮ§гғјгғі |жјўйҹіиӘӯгҒҝ = гҒҳгӮ“гҒ—гӮ“ |ж…Јз”ЁиӘӯгҒҝ = гҒҝгҒҡгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ
гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn}} }} '''еЈ¬з”і'''пјҲгҒҝгҒҡгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢгҖҒгҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢгҖҒгҒҳгӮ“гҒ—гӮ“пјүгҒҜгҖҒ[[е№Іж”Ҝ]]гҒ®дёҖгҒӨгҖӮ е№Іж”ҜгҒ®зө„гҒҝеҗҲгӮҸгҒӣгҒ®9з•Әзӣ®гҒ§гҖҒеүҚгҒҜ[[иҫӣжңӘ]]гҖҒж¬ЎгҒҜ[[зҷёй…ү]]гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ[[йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢ]]гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒ[[еҚҒе№І]]гҒ®[[еЈ¬]]гҒҜйҷҪгҒ®[[ж°ҙ]]гҖҒ[[еҚҒдәҢж”Ҝ]]гҒ®[[з”і]]гҒҜйҷҪгҒ®[[йҮ‘]]гҒ§гҖҒ [[дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі#зӣёз”ҹпјҲгҒқгҒҶгҒҳгӮҮгҒҶпјү|зӣёз”ҹ]]пјҲйҮ‘з”ҹж°ҙпјүгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®е№ҙ== [[иҘҝжҡҰ]]е№ҙгӮ’60гҒ§еүІгҒЈгҒҰ12гҒҢдҪҷгӮӢе№ҙгҒҢеЈ¬з”ігҒ®[[е№ҙ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮ {| class="wikitable" |+'''еЈ¬з”ігҒ®е№ҙ''' |- ![[1еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]]!![[2еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]]!![[3еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]] |- | *[[12е№ҙ]] *[[72е№ҙ]] *[[132е№ҙ]] *[[192е№ҙ]] *[[252е№ҙ]] *[[312е№ҙ]] *[[372е№ҙ]] *[[432е№ҙ]] *[[492е№ҙ]] *[[552е№ҙ]] *[[612е№ҙ]] *[[672е№ҙ]] *[[732е№ҙ]] *[[792е№ҙ]] *[[852е№ҙ]] *[[912е№ҙ]] *[[972е№ҙ]] | *[[1032е№ҙ]] *[[1092е№ҙ]] *[[1152е№ҙ]] *[[1212е№ҙ]] *[[1272е№ҙ]] *[[1332е№ҙ]] *[[1392е№ҙ]] *[[1452е№ҙ]] *[[1512е№ҙ]] *[[1572е№ҙ]] *[[1632е№ҙ]] *[[1692е№ҙ]] *[[1752е№ҙ]] *[[1812е№ҙ]] *[[1872е№ҙ]] *[[1932е№ҙ]] *[[1992е№ҙ]] | *[[2052е№ҙ]] *[[2112е№ҙ]] *[[2172е№ҙ]] *[[2232е№ҙ]] *[[2292е№ҙ]] *[[2352е№ҙ]] *[[2412е№ҙ]] *[[2472е№ҙ]] *[[2532е№ҙ]] *[[2592е№ҙ]] *[[2652е№ҙ]] *[[2712е№ҙ]] *[[2772е№ҙ]] *[[2832е№ҙ]] *[[2892е№ҙ]] *[[2952е№ҙ]] |} ===еҮәжқҘдәӢ=== *[[еӨ©жҷәеӨ©зҡҮ]]11е№ҙпјҲ672е№ҙпјү - [[еЈ¬з”ігҒ®д№ұ]]гҖӮ *[[жҳҺжІ»]]5е№ҙпјҲ1872е№ҙпјүгҒ«з·ЁиЈҪгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжҲёзұҚгҒҜ[[еЈ¬з”іжҲёзұҚ]]гҒЁе‘јгҒ°гӮҢгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®жңҲ== иҘҝжҡҰе№ҙгҒ®дёӢ1жЎҒгҒҢ4гғ»9пјҲеҚҒе№ІгҒҢ[[з”І]]гғ»[[е·ұ]]пјүгҒ®е№ҙгҒ®[[7жңҲ]]гҒҢеЈ¬з”ігҒ®[[жңҲ (жҡҰ)|жңҲ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮгҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҒ“гҒ“гҒ§гҒ„гҒҶжңҲгҒҜгҖҒ[[ж—§жҡҰ]]гҒ®жңҲгӮ„[[зҜҖжңҲ]]пјҲ[[з«Ӣз§Ӣ]]гҒӢгӮү[[зҷҪйңІ]]гҒ®еүҚж—ҘгҒҫгҒ§пјүгӮ’йҒ©з”ЁгҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲгӮӮгҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—Ҙ== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒ®[[йҒёж—Ҙ]]гҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®йҖҡгӮҠгҖӮ ===йҒёж—Ҙ=== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒҜ[[зҠҜеңҹ|еӨ§еңҹ]]гҒ®3ж—Ҙзӣ®гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”іжҷӮ== 16жҷӮгҒӢгӮү18жҷӮгҒҫгҒ§гӮ’жҢҮгҒҷгҖӮ ==й–ўйҖЈй …зӣ®== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:гҒҝгҒҷгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:new pages]] [[ja:еЈ¬з”і]]

revision.text:
{{е№Іж”Ҝ}} {{дёӯиҸҜеңҸгҒ®дәӢзү© |гӮҝгӮӨгғҲгғ« = еЈ¬з”і |з”»еғҸзЁ®еҲҘ = |з”»еғҸ = |з”»еғҸгҒ®иӘ¬жҳҺ = |з№ҒдҪ“еӯ— = еЈ¬з”і |з°ЎдҪ“еӯ— = еЈ¬з”і |гғ”гғійҹі = rГ©nshД“n |йҖҡз”Ёгғ”гғійҹі = |жіЁйҹіз¬ҰеҸ· = г„–г„ЈЛҠг„•г„Ј |гғ©гғҶгғіеӯ— = |гӮ«гӮҝгӮ«гғҠ = гғ¬гғігӮ·гӮ§гғјгғі |жјўйҹіиӘӯгҒҝ = гҒҳгӮ“гҒ—гӮ“ |ж…Јз”ЁиӘӯгҒҝ = гҒҝгҒҡгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ
гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn}} }} '''еЈ¬з”і'''пјҲгҒҝгҒҡгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢгҖҒгҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢгҖҒгҒҳгӮ“гҒ—гӮ“пјүгҒҜгҖҒ[[е№Іж”Ҝ]]гҒ®дёҖгҒӨгҖӮ е№Іж”ҜгҒ®зө„гҒҝеҗҲгӮҸгҒӣгҒ®9з•Әзӣ®гҒ§гҖҒеүҚгҒҜ[[иҫӣжңӘ]]гҖҒж¬ЎгҒҜ[[зҷёй…ү]]гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ[[йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢ]]гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒ[[еҚҒе№І]]гҒ®[[еЈ¬]]гҒҜйҷҪгҒ®[[ж°ҙ]]гҖҒ[[еҚҒдәҢж”Ҝ]]гҒ®[[з”і]]гҒҜйҷҪгҒ®[[йҮ‘]]гҒ§гҖҒ [[дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі#зӣёз”ҹпјҲгҒқгҒҶгҒҳгӮҮгҒҶпјү|зӣёз”ҹ]]пјҲйҮ‘з”ҹж°ҙпјүгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®е№ҙ== [[иҘҝжҡҰ]]е№ҙгӮ’60гҒ§еүІгҒЈгҒҰ12гҒҢдҪҷгӮӢе№ҙгҒҢеЈ¬з”ігҒ®[[е№ҙ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮ {| class="wikitable" |+'''еЈ¬з”ігҒ®е№ҙ''' |- ![[1еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]]!![[2еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]]!![[3еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]] |- | *[[12е№ҙ]] *[[72е№ҙ]] *[[132е№ҙ]] *[[192е№ҙ]] *[[252е№ҙ]] *[[312е№ҙ]] *[[372е№ҙ]] *[[432е№ҙ]] *[[492е№ҙ]] *[[552е№ҙ]] *[[612е№ҙ]] *[[672е№ҙ]] *[[732е№ҙ]] *[[792е№ҙ]] *[[852е№ҙ]] *[[912е№ҙ]] *[[972е№ҙ]] | *[[1032е№ҙ]] *[[1092е№ҙ]] *[[1152е№ҙ]] *[[1212е№ҙ]] *[[1272е№ҙ]] *[[1332е№ҙ]] *[[1392е№ҙ]] *[[1452е№ҙ]] *[[1512е№ҙ]] *[[1572е№ҙ]] *[[1632е№ҙ]] *[[1692е№ҙ]] *[[1752е№ҙ]] *[[1812е№ҙ]] *[[1872е№ҙ]] *[[1932е№ҙ]] *[[1992е№ҙ]] | *[[2052е№ҙ]] *[[2112е№ҙ]] *[[2172е№ҙ]] *[[2232е№ҙ]] *[[2292е№ҙ]] *[[2352е№ҙ]] *[[2412е№ҙ]] *[[2472е№ҙ]] *[[2532е№ҙ]] *[[2592е№ҙ]] *[[2652е№ҙ]] *[[2712е№ҙ]] *[[2772е№ҙ]] *[[2832е№ҙ]] *[[2892е№ҙ]] *[[2952е№ҙ]] |} ===еҮәжқҘдәӢ=== *[[еӨ©жҷәеӨ©зҡҮ]]11е№ҙпјҲ672е№ҙпјү - [[еЈ¬з”ігҒ®д№ұ]]гҖӮ *[[жҳҺжІ»]]5е№ҙпјҲ1872е№ҙпјүгҒ«з·ЁиЈҪгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжҲёзұҚгҒҜ[[еЈ¬з”іжҲёзұҚ]]гҒЁе‘јгҒ°гӮҢгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®жңҲ== иҘҝжҡҰе№ҙгҒ®дёӢ1жЎҒгҒҢ4гғ»9пјҲеҚҒе№ІгҒҢ[[з”І]]гғ»[[е·ұ]]пјүгҒ®е№ҙгҒ®[[7жңҲ]]гҒҢеЈ¬з”ігҒ®[[жңҲ (жҡҰ)|жңҲ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮгҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҒ“гҒ“гҒ§гҒ„гҒҶжңҲгҒҜгҖҒ[[ж—§жҡҰ]]гҒ®жңҲгӮ„[[зҜҖжңҲ]]пјҲ[[з«Ӣз§Ӣ]]гҒӢгӮү[[зҷҪйңІ]]гҒ®еүҚж—ҘгҒҫгҒ§пјүгӮ’йҒ©з”ЁгҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲгӮӮгҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—Ҙ== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒ®[[йҒёж—Ҙ]]гҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®йҖҡгӮҠгҖӮ ===йҒёж—Ҙ=== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒҜ[[зҠҜеңҹ|еӨ§еңҹ]]гҒ®3ж—Ҙзӣ®гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”іжҷӮ== 16жҷӮгҒӢгӮү18жҷӮгҒҫгҒ§гӮ’жҢҮгҒҷгҖӮ ==й–ўйҖЈй …зӣ®== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:гҒҝгҒҷгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:new pages]] [[ja:еЈ¬з”і]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{е№Іж”Ҝ}} {{дёӯиҸҜеңҸгҒ®дәӢзү© |гӮҝгӮӨгғҲгғ« = еЈ¬з”і |з”»еғҸзЁ®еҲҘ = |з”»еғҸ = |з”»еғҸгҒ®иӘ¬жҳҺ = |з№ҒдҪ“еӯ— = еЈ¬з”і |з°ЎдҪ“еӯ— = еЈ¬з”і |гғ”гғійҹі = rГ©nshД“n |йҖҡз”Ёгғ”гғійҹі = |жіЁйҹіз¬ҰеҸ· = г„–г„ЈЛҠг„•г„Ј |гғ©гғҶгғіеӯ— = |гӮ«гӮҝгӮ«гғҠ = гғ¬гғігӮ·гӮ§гғјгғі |жјўйҹіиӘӯгҒҝ = гҒҳгӮ“гҒ—гӮ“ |ж…Јз”ЁиӘӯгҒҝ = гҒҝгҒҡгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ
гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn}} }} '''еЈ¬з”і'''пјҲгҒҝгҒҡгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢгҖҒгҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢгҖҒгҒҳгӮ“гҒ—гӮ“пјүгҒҜгҖҒ[[е№Іж”Ҝ]]гҒ®дёҖгҒӨгҖӮ е№Іж”ҜгҒ®зө„гҒҝеҗҲгӮҸгҒӣгҒ®9з•Әзӣ®гҒ§гҖҒеүҚгҒҜ[[иҫӣжңӘ]]гҖҒж¬ЎгҒҜ[[зҷёй…ү]]гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ[[йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢ]]гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒ[[еҚҒе№І]]гҒ®[[еЈ¬]]гҒҜйҷҪгҒ®[[ж°ҙ]]гҖҒ[[еҚҒдәҢж”Ҝ]]гҒ®[[з”і]]гҒҜйҷҪгҒ®[[йҮ‘]]гҒ§гҖҒ [[дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі#зӣёз”ҹпјҲгҒқгҒҶгҒҳгӮҮгҒҶпјү|зӣёз”ҹ]]пјҲйҮ‘з”ҹж°ҙпјүгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®е№ҙ== [[иҘҝжҡҰ]]е№ҙгӮ’60гҒ§еүІгҒЈгҒҰ12гҒҢдҪҷгӮӢе№ҙгҒҢеЈ¬з”ігҒ®[[е№ҙ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮ {| class="wikitable" |+'''еЈ¬з”ігҒ®е№ҙ''' |- ![[1еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]]!![[2еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]]!![[3еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]] |- | *[[12е№ҙ]] *[[72е№ҙ]] *[[132е№ҙ]] *[[192е№ҙ]] *[[252е№ҙ]] *[[312е№ҙ]] *[[372е№ҙ]] *[[432е№ҙ]] *[[492е№ҙ]] *[[552е№ҙ]] *[[612е№ҙ]] *[[672е№ҙ]] *[[732е№ҙ]] *[[792е№ҙ]] *[[852е№ҙ]] *[[912е№ҙ]] *[[972е№ҙ]] | *[[1032е№ҙ]] *[[1092е№ҙ]] *[[1152е№ҙ]] *[[1212е№ҙ]] *[[1272е№ҙ]] *[[1332е№ҙ]] *[[1392е№ҙ]] *[[1452е№ҙ]] *[[1512е№ҙ]] *[[1572е№ҙ]] *[[1632е№ҙ]] *[[1692е№ҙ]] *[[1752е№ҙ]] *[[1812е№ҙ]] *[[1872е№ҙ]] *[[1932е№ҙ]] *[[1992е№ҙ]] | *[[2052е№ҙ]] *[[2112е№ҙ]] *[[2172е№ҙ]] *[[2232е№ҙ]] *[[2292е№ҙ]] *[[2352е№ҙ]] *[[2412е№ҙ]] *[[2472е№ҙ]] *[[2532е№ҙ]] *[[2592е№ҙ]] *[[2652е№ҙ]] *[[2712е№ҙ]] *[[2772е№ҙ]] *[[2832е№ҙ]] *[[2892е№ҙ]] *[[2952е№ҙ]] |} ===еҮәжқҘдәӢ=== *[[еӨ©жҷәеӨ©зҡҮ]]11е№ҙпјҲ672е№ҙпјү - [[еЈ¬з”ігҒ®д№ұ]]гҖӮ *[[жҳҺжІ»]]5е№ҙпјҲ1872е№ҙпјүгҒ«з·ЁиЈҪгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжҲёзұҚгҒҜ[[еЈ¬з”іжҲёзұҚ]]гҒЁе‘јгҒ°гӮҢгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®жңҲ== иҘҝжҡҰе№ҙгҒ®дёӢ1жЎҒгҒҢ4гғ»9пјҲеҚҒе№ІгҒҢ[[з”І]]гғ»[[е·ұ]]пјүгҒ®е№ҙгҒ®[[7жңҲ]]гҒҢеЈ¬з”ігҒ®[[жңҲ (жҡҰ)|жңҲ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮгҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҒ“гҒ“гҒ§гҒ„гҒҶжңҲгҒҜгҖҒ[[ж—§жҡҰ]]гҒ®жңҲгӮ„[[зҜҖжңҲ]]пјҲ[[з«Ӣз§Ӣ]]гҒӢгӮү[[зҷҪйңІ]]гҒ®еүҚж—ҘгҒҫгҒ§пјүгӮ’йҒ©з”ЁгҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲгӮӮгҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—Ҙ== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒ®[[йҒёж—Ҙ]]гҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®йҖҡгӮҠгҖӮ ===йҒёж—Ҙ=== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒҜ[[зҠҜеңҹ|еӨ§еңҹ]]гҒ®3ж—Ҙзӣ®гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”іжҷӮ== 16жҷӮгҒӢгӮү18жҷӮгҒҫгҒ§гӮ’жҢҮгҒҷгҖӮ ==й–ўйҖЈй …зӣ®== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:гҒҝгҒҷгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:new pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:еЈ¬з”і]]

revision.text:
{{е№Іж”Ҝ}} {{дёӯиҸҜеңҸгҒ®дәӢзү© |гӮҝгӮӨгғҲгғ« = еЈ¬з”і |з”»еғҸзЁ®еҲҘ = |з”»еғҸ = |з”»еғҸгҒ®иӘ¬жҳҺ = |з№ҒдҪ“еӯ— = еЈ¬з”і |з°ЎдҪ“еӯ— = еЈ¬з”і |гғ”гғійҹі = rГ©nshД“n |йҖҡз”Ёгғ”гғійҹі = |жіЁйҹіз¬ҰеҸ· = г„–г„ЈЛҠг„•г„Ј |гғ©гғҶгғіеӯ— = |гӮ«гӮҝгӮ«гғҠ = гғ¬гғігӮ·гӮ§гғјгғі |жјўйҹіиӘӯгҒҝ = гҒҳгӮ“гҒ—гӮ“ |ж…Јз”ЁиӘӯгҒҝ = гҒҝгҒҡгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ
гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn}} }} '''еЈ¬з”і'''пјҲгҒҝгҒҡгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢгҖҒгҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢгҖҒгҒҳгӮ“гҒ—гӮ“пјүгҒҜгҖҒ[[е№Іж”Ҝ]]гҒ®дёҖгҒӨгҖӮ е№Іж”ҜгҒ®зө„гҒҝеҗҲгӮҸгҒӣгҒ®9з•Әзӣ®гҒ§гҖҒеүҚгҒҜ[[иҫӣжңӘ]]гҖҒж¬ЎгҒҜ[[зҷёй…ү]]гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ[[йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢ]]гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒ[[еҚҒе№І]]гҒ®[[еЈ¬]]гҒҜйҷҪгҒ®[[ж°ҙ]]гҖҒ[[еҚҒдәҢж”Ҝ]]гҒ®[[з”і]]гҒҜйҷҪгҒ®[[йҮ‘]]гҒ§гҖҒ [[дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі#зӣёз”ҹпјҲгҒқгҒҶгҒҳгӮҮгҒҶпјү|зӣёз”ҹ]]пјҲйҮ‘з”ҹж°ҙпјүгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®е№ҙ== [[иҘҝжҡҰ]]е№ҙгӮ’60гҒ§еүІгҒЈгҒҰ12гҒҢдҪҷгӮӢе№ҙгҒҢеЈ¬з”ігҒ®[[е№ҙ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮ {| class="wikitable" |+'''еЈ¬з”ігҒ®е№ҙ''' |- ![[1еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]]!![[2еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]]!![[3еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]] |- | *[[12е№ҙ]] *[[72е№ҙ]] *[[132е№ҙ]] *[[192е№ҙ]] *[[252е№ҙ]] *[[312е№ҙ]] *[[372е№ҙ]] *[[432е№ҙ]] *[[492е№ҙ]] *[[552е№ҙ]] *[[612е№ҙ]] *[[672е№ҙ]] *[[732е№ҙ]] *[[792е№ҙ]] *[[852е№ҙ]] *[[912е№ҙ]] *[[972е№ҙ]] | *[[1032е№ҙ]] *[[1092е№ҙ]] *[[1152е№ҙ]] *[[1212е№ҙ]] *[[1272е№ҙ]] *[[1332е№ҙ]] *[[1392е№ҙ]] *[[1452е№ҙ]] *[[1512е№ҙ]] *[[1572е№ҙ]] *[[1632е№ҙ]] *[[1692е№ҙ]] *[[1752е№ҙ]] *[[1812е№ҙ]] *[[1872е№ҙ]] *[[1932е№ҙ]] *[[1992е№ҙ]] | *[[2052е№ҙ]] *[[2112е№ҙ]] *[[2172е№ҙ]] *[[2232е№ҙ]] *[[2292е№ҙ]] *[[2352е№ҙ]] *[[2412е№ҙ]] *[[2472е№ҙ]] *[[2532е№ҙ]] *[[2592е№ҙ]] *[[2652е№ҙ]] *[[2712е№ҙ]] *[[2772е№ҙ]] *[[2832е№ҙ]] *[[2892е№ҙ]] *[[2952е№ҙ]] |} ===еҮәжқҘдәӢ=== *[[еӨ©жҷәеӨ©зҡҮ]]11е№ҙпјҲ672е№ҙпјү - [[еЈ¬з”ігҒ®д№ұ]]гҖӮ *[[жҳҺжІ»]]5е№ҙпјҲ1872е№ҙпјүгҒ«з·ЁиЈҪгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжҲёзұҚгҒҜ[[еЈ¬з”іжҲёзұҚ]]гҒЁе‘јгҒ°гӮҢгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®жңҲ== иҘҝжҡҰе№ҙгҒ®дёӢ1жЎҒгҒҢ4гғ»9пјҲеҚҒе№ІгҒҢ[[з”І]]гғ»[[е·ұ]]пјүгҒ®е№ҙгҒ®[[7жңҲ]]гҒҢеЈ¬з”ігҒ®[[жңҲ (жҡҰ)|жңҲ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮгҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҒ“гҒ“гҒ§гҒ„гҒҶжңҲгҒҜгҖҒ[[ж—§жҡҰ]]гҒ®жңҲгӮ„[[зҜҖжңҲ]]пјҲ[[з«Ӣз§Ӣ]]гҒӢгӮү[[зҷҪйңІ]]гҒ®еүҚж—ҘгҒҫгҒ§пјүгӮ’йҒ©з”ЁгҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲгӮӮгҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—Ҙ== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒ®[[йҒёж—Ҙ]]гҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®йҖҡгӮҠгҖӮ ===йҒёж—Ҙ=== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒҜ[[зҠҜеңҹ|еӨ§еңҹ]]гҒ®3ж—Ҙзӣ®гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”іжҷӮ== 16жҷӮгҒӢгӮү18жҷӮгҒҫгҒ§гӮ’жҢҮгҒҷгҖӮ ==й–ўйҖЈй …зӣ®== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:гҒҝгҒҷгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:еЈ¬з”і]]

{{е№Іж”Ҝ}} {{дёӯиҸҜеңҸгҒ®дәӢзү© |гӮҝгӮӨгғҲгғ« = еЈ¬з”і |з”»еғҸзЁ®еҲҘ = |з”»еғҸ = |з”»еғҸгҒ®иӘ¬жҳҺ = |з№ҒдҪ“еӯ— = еЈ¬з”і |з°ЎдҪ“еӯ— = еЈ¬з”і |гғ”гғійҹі = rГ©nshД“n |йҖҡз”Ёгғ”гғійҹі = |жіЁйҹіз¬ҰеҸ· = г„–г„ЈЛҠг„•г„Ј |гғ©гғҶгғіеӯ— = |гӮ«гӮҝгӮ«гғҠ = гғ¬гғігӮ·гӮ§гғјгғі |жјўйҹіиӘӯгҒҝ = гҒҳгӮ“гҒ—гӮ“ |ж…Јз”ЁиӘӯгҒҝ = гҒҝгҒҡгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ
гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn}} }} '''еЈ¬з”і'''пјҲгҒҝгҒҡгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢгҖҒгҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢгҖҒгҒҳгӮ“гҒ—гӮ“пјүгҒҜгҖҒ[[е№Іж”Ҝ]]гҒ®дёҖгҒӨгҖӮ е№Іж”ҜгҒ®зө„гҒҝеҗҲгӮҸгҒӣгҒ®9з•Әзӣ®гҒ§гҖҒеүҚгҒҜ[[иҫӣжңӘ]]гҖҒж¬ЎгҒҜ[[зҷёй…ү]]гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ[[йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢ]]гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒ[[еҚҒе№І]]гҒ®[[еЈ¬]]гҒҜйҷҪгҒ®[[ж°ҙ]]гҖҒ[[еҚҒдәҢж”Ҝ]]гҒ®[[з”і]]гҒҜйҷҪгҒ®[[йҮ‘]]гҒ§гҖҒ [[дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі#зӣёз”ҹпјҲгҒқгҒҶгҒҳгӮҮгҒҶпјү|зӣёз”ҹ]]пјҲйҮ‘з”ҹж°ҙпјүгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®е№ҙ== [[иҘҝжҡҰ]]е№ҙгӮ’60гҒ§еүІгҒЈгҒҰ12гҒҢдҪҷгӮӢе№ҙгҒҢеЈ¬з”ігҒ®[[е№ҙ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮ {| class="wikitable" |+'''еЈ¬з”ігҒ®е№ҙ''' |- ![[1еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]]!![[2еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]]!![[3еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]] |- | *[[12е№ҙ]] *[[72е№ҙ]] *[[132е№ҙ]] *[[192е№ҙ]] *[[252е№ҙ]] *[[312е№ҙ]] *[[372е№ҙ]] *[[432е№ҙ]] *[[492е№ҙ]] *[[552е№ҙ]] *[[612е№ҙ]] *[[672е№ҙ]] *[[732е№ҙ]] *[[792е№ҙ]] *[[852е№ҙ]] *[[912е№ҙ]] *[[972е№ҙ]] | *[[1032е№ҙ]] *[[1092е№ҙ]] *[[1152е№ҙ]] *[[1212е№ҙ]] *[[1272е№ҙ]] *[[1332е№ҙ]] *[[1392е№ҙ]] *[[1452е№ҙ]] *[[1512е№ҙ]] *[[1572е№ҙ]] *[[1632е№ҙ]] *[[1692е№ҙ]] *[[1752е№ҙ]] *[[1812е№ҙ]] *[[1872е№ҙ]] *[[1932е№ҙ]] *[[1992е№ҙ]] | *[[2052е№ҙ]] *[[2112е№ҙ]] *[[2172е№ҙ]] *[[2232е№ҙ]] *[[2292е№ҙ]] *[[2352е№ҙ]] *[[2412е№ҙ]] *[[2472е№ҙ]] *[[2532е№ҙ]] *[[2592е№ҙ]] *[[2652е№ҙ]] *[[2712е№ҙ]] *[[2772е№ҙ]] *[[2832е№ҙ]] *[[2892е№ҙ]] *[[2952е№ҙ]] |} ===еҮәжқҘдәӢ=== *[[еӨ©жҷәеӨ©зҡҮ]]11е№ҙпјҲ672е№ҙпјү - [[еЈ¬з”ігҒ®д№ұ]]гҖӮ *[[жҳҺжІ»]]5е№ҙпјҲ1872е№ҙпјүгҒ«з·ЁиЈҪгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжҲёзұҚгҒҜ[[еЈ¬з”іжҲёзұҚ]]гҒЁе‘јгҒ°гӮҢгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®жңҲ== иҘҝжҡҰе№ҙгҒ®дёӢ1жЎҒгҒҢ4гғ»9пјҲеҚҒе№ІгҒҢ[[з”І]]гғ»[[е·ұ]]пјүгҒ®е№ҙгҒ®[[7жңҲ]]гҒҢеЈ¬з”ігҒ®[[жңҲ (жҡҰ)|жңҲ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮгҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҒ“гҒ“гҒ§гҒ„гҒҶжңҲгҒҜгҖҒ[[ж—§жҡҰ]]гҒ®жңҲгӮ„[[зҜҖжңҲ]]пјҲ[[з«Ӣз§Ӣ]]гҒӢгӮү[[зҷҪйңІ]]гҒ®еүҚж—ҘгҒҫгҒ§пјүгӮ’йҒ©з”ЁгҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲгӮӮгҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—Ҙ== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒ®[[йҒёж—Ҙ]]гҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®йҖҡгӮҠгҖӮ ===йҒёж—Ҙ=== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒҜ[[зҠҜеңҹ|еӨ§еңҹ]]гҒ®3ж—Ҙзӣ®гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”іжҷӮ== 16жҷӮгҒӢгӮү18жҷӮгҒҫгҒ§гӮ’жҢҮгҒҷгҖӮ ==й–ўйҖЈй …зӣ®== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:гҒҝгҒҷгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[category{еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:еЈ¬з”і]]

[[еЈ¬з”ігҒ®д№ұ]]гҖӮ *[[жҳҺжІ»]]5е№ҙпјҲ1872е№ҙпјүгҒ«з·ЁиЈҪгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжҲёзұҚгҒҜ[[еЈ¬з”іжҲёзұҚ]]гҒЁе‘јгҒ°гӮҢгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®жңҲ== иҘҝжҡҰе№ҙгҒ®дёӢ1жЎҒгҒҢ4гғ»9пјҲеҚҒе№ІгҒҢ[[з”І]]гғ»[[е·ұ]]пјүгҒ®е№ҙгҒ®[[7жңҲ]]гҒҢеЈ¬з”ігҒ®[[жңҲ (жҡҰ)|жңҲ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮгҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҒ“гҒ“гҒ§гҒ„гҒҶжңҲгҒҜгҖҒ[[ж—§жҡҰ]]гҒ®жңҲгӮ„[[зҜҖжңҲ]]пјҲ[[з«Ӣз§Ӣ]]гҒӢгӮү[[зҷҪйңІ]]гҒ®еүҚж—ҘгҒҫгҒ§пјүгӮ’йҒ©з”ЁгҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲгӮӮгҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—Ҙ== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒ®[[йҒёж—Ҙ]]гҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®йҖҡгӮҠгҖӮ ===йҒёж—Ҙ=== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒҜ[[зҠҜеңҹ|еӨ§еңҹ]]гҒ®3ж—Ҙзӣ®гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”іжҷӮ== 16жҷӮгҒӢгӮү18жҷӮгҒҫгҒ§гӮ’жҢҮгҒҷгҖӮ ==й–ўйҖЈй …зӣ®== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:гҒҝгҒҷгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[category{еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:еЈ¬з”і]]

revision.text:
{{е№Іж”Ҝ}} {{дёӯиҸҜеңҸгҒ®дәӢзү© |гӮҝгӮӨгғҲгғ« = еЈ¬з”і |з”»еғҸзЁ®еҲҘ = |з”»еғҸ = |з”»еғҸгҒ®иӘ¬жҳҺ = |з№ҒдҪ“еӯ— = еЈ¬з”і |з°ЎдҪ“еӯ— = еЈ¬з”і |гғ”гғійҹі = rГ©nshД“n |йҖҡз”Ёгғ”гғійҹі = |жіЁйҹіз¬ҰеҸ· = г„–г„ЈЛҠг„•г„Ј |гғ©гғҶгғіеӯ— = |гӮ«гӮҝгӮ«гғҠ = гғ¬гғігӮ·гӮ§гғјгғі |жјўйҹіиӘӯгҒҝ = гҒҳгӮ“гҒ—гӮ“ |ж…Јз”ЁиӘӯгҒҝ = гҒҝгҒҡгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ
гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn}} }} '''еЈ¬з”і'''пјҲгҒҝгҒҡгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢгҖҒгҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢгҖҒгҒҳгӮ“гҒ—гӮ“пјүгҒҜгҖҒ[[е№Іж”Ҝ]]гҒ®дёҖгҒӨгҖӮ е№Іж”ҜгҒ®зө„гҒҝеҗҲгӮҸгҒӣгҒ®9з•Әзӣ®гҒ§гҖҒеүҚгҒҜ[[иҫӣжңӘ]]гҖҒж¬ЎгҒҜ[[зҷёй…ү]]гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ[[йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢ]]гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒ[[еҚҒе№І]]гҒ®[[еЈ¬]]гҒҜйҷҪгҒ®[[ж°ҙ]]гҖҒ[[еҚҒдәҢж”Ҝ]]гҒ®[[з”і]]гҒҜйҷҪгҒ®[[йҮ‘]]гҒ§гҖҒ [[дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі#зӣёз”ҹпјҲгҒқгҒҶгҒҳгӮҮгҒҶпјү|зӣёз”ҹ]]пјҲйҮ‘з”ҹж°ҙпјүгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®е№ҙ== [[иҘҝжҡҰ]]е№ҙгӮ’60гҒ§еүІгҒЈгҒҰ12гҒҢдҪҷгӮӢе№ҙгҒҢеЈ¬з”ігҒ®[[е№ҙ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮ {| class="wikitable" |+'''еЈ¬з”ігҒ®е№ҙ''' |- ![[1еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]]!![[2еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]]!![[3еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]] |- | *[[12е№ҙ]] *[[72е№ҙ]] *[[132е№ҙ]] *[[192е№ҙ]] *[[252е№ҙ]] *[[312е№ҙ]] *[[372е№ҙ]] *[[432е№ҙ]] *[[492е№ҙ]] *[[552е№ҙ]] *[[612е№ҙ]] *[[672е№ҙ]] *[[732е№ҙ]] *[[792е№ҙ]] *[[852е№ҙ]] *[[912е№ҙ]] *[[972е№ҙ]] | *[[1032е№ҙ]] *[[1092е№ҙ]] *[[1152е№ҙ]] *[[1212е№ҙ]] *[[1272е№ҙ]] *[[1332е№ҙ]] *[[1392е№ҙ]] *[[1452е№ҙ]] *[[1512е№ҙ]] *[[1572е№ҙ]] *[[1632е№ҙ]] *[[1692е№ҙ]] *[[1752е№ҙ]] *[[1812е№ҙ]] *[[1872е№ҙ]] *[[1932е№ҙ]] *[[1992е№ҙ]] | *[[2052е№ҙ]] *[[2112е№ҙ]] *[[2172е№ҙ]] *[[2232е№ҙ]] *[[2292е№ҙ]] *[[2352е№ҙ]] *[[2412е№ҙ]] *[[2472е№ҙ]] *[[2532е№ҙ]] *[[2592е№ҙ]] *[[2652е№ҙ]] *[[2712е№ҙ]] *[[2772е№ҙ]] *[[2832е№ҙ]] *[[2892е№ҙ]] *[[2952е№ҙ]] |} ===еҮәжқҘдәӢ=== *[[еӨ©жҷәеӨ©зҡҮ]]11е№ҙпјҲ672е№ҙпјү - [[еЈ¬з”ігҒ®д№ұ]]гҖӮ *[[жҳҺжІ»]]5е№ҙпјҲ1872е№ҙпјүгҒ«з·ЁиЈҪгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжҲёзұҚгҒҜ[[еЈ¬з”іжҲёзұҚ]]гҒЁе‘јгҒ°гӮҢгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®жңҲ== иҘҝжҡҰе№ҙгҒ®дёӢ1жЎҒгҒҢ4гғ»9пјҲеҚҒе№ІгҒҢ[[з”І]]гғ»[[е·ұ]]пјүгҒ®е№ҙгҒ®[[7жңҲ]]гҒҢеЈ¬з”ігҒ®[[жңҲ (жҡҰ)|жңҲ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮгҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҒ“гҒ“гҒ§гҒ„гҒҶжңҲгҒҜгҖҒ[[ж—§жҡҰ]]гҒ®жңҲгӮ„[[зҜҖжңҲ]]пјҲ[[з«Ӣз§Ӣ]]гҒӢгӮү[[зҷҪйңІ]]гҒ®еүҚж—ҘгҒҫгҒ§пјүгӮ’йҒ©з”ЁгҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲгӮӮгҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—Ҙ== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒ®[[йҒёж—Ҙ]]гҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®йҖҡгӮҠгҖӮ ===йҒёж—Ҙ=== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒҜ[[зҠҜеңҹ|еӨ§еңҹ]]гҒ®3ж—Ҙзӣ®гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”іжҷӮ== 16жҷӮгҒӢгӮү18жҷӮгҒҫгҒ§гӮ’жҢҮгҒҷгҖӮ ==й–ўйҖЈй …зӣ®== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:гҒҝгҒҷгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:unsorted completion categories]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[ja:еЈ¬з”і]]

гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn}} }} '''еЈ¬з”і'''пјҲгҒҝгҒҡгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢгҖҒгҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢгҖҒгҒҳгӮ“гҒ—гӮ“пјүгҒҜгҖҒ[[е№Іж”Ҝ]]гҒ®дёҖгҒӨгҖӮ е№Іж”ҜгҒ®зө„гҒҝеҗҲгӮҸгҒӣгҒ®9з•Әзӣ®гҒ§гҖҒеүҚгҒҜ[[иҫӣжңӘ]]гҖҒж¬ЎгҒҜ[[зҷёй…ү]]гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ[[йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢ]]гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒ[[еҚҒе№І]]гҒ®[[еЈ¬]]гҒҜйҷҪгҒ®[[ж°ҙ]]гҖҒ[[еҚҒдәҢж”Ҝ]]гҒ®[[з”і]]гҒҜйҷҪгҒ®[[йҮ‘]]гҒ§гҖҒ [[дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі#зӣёз”ҹпјҲгҒқгҒҶгҒҳгӮҮгҒҶпјү|зӣёз”ҹ]]пјҲйҮ‘з”ҹж°ҙпјүгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®е№ҙ== [[иҘҝжҡҰ]]е№ҙгӮ’60гҒ§еүІгҒЈгҒҰ12гҒҢдҪҷгӮӢе№ҙгҒҢеЈ¬з”ігҒ®[[е№ҙ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮ {| class="wikitable" |+'''еЈ¬з”ігҒ®е№ҙ''' |- ![[1еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]]!![[2еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]]!![[3еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]] |- | *[[12е№ҙ]] *[[72е№ҙ]] *[[132е№ҙ]] *[[192е№ҙ]] *[[252е№ҙ]] *[[312е№ҙ]] *[[372е№ҙ]] *[[432е№ҙ]] *[[492е№ҙ]] *[[552е№ҙ]] *[[612е№ҙ]] *[[672е№ҙ]] *[[732е№ҙ]] *[[792е№ҙ]] *[[852е№ҙ]] *[[912е№ҙ]] *[[972е№ҙ]] | *[[1032е№ҙ]] *[[1092е№ҙ]] *[[1152е№ҙ]] *[[1212е№ҙ]] *[[1272е№ҙ]] *[[1332е№ҙ]] *[[1392е№ҙ]] *[[1452е№ҙ]] *[[1512е№ҙ]] *[[1572е№ҙ]] *[[1632е№ҙ]] *[[1692е№ҙ]] *[[1752е№ҙ]] *[[1812е№ҙ]] *[[1872е№ҙ]] *[[1932е№ҙ]] *[[1992е№ҙ]] | *[[2052е№ҙ]] *[[2112е№ҙ]] *[[2172е№ҙ]] *[[2232е№ҙ]] *[[2292е№ҙ]] *[[2352е№ҙ]] *[[2412е№ҙ]] *[[2472е№ҙ]] *[[2532е№ҙ]] *[[2592е№ҙ]] *[[2652е№ҙ]] *[[2712е№ҙ]] *[[2772е№ҙ]] *[[2832е№ҙ]] *[[2892е№ҙ]] *[[2952е№ҙ]] |} ===еҮәжқҘдәӢ=== *[[еӨ©жҷәеӨ©зҡҮ]]11е№ҙпјҲ672е№ҙпјү - {{е№Іж”Ҝ}} {{дёӯиҸҜеңҸгҒ®дәӢзү© |гӮҝгӮӨгғҲгғ« = еЈ¬з”і |FileзЁ®еҲҘ = |File = |FileгҒ®иӘ¬жҳҺ = |з№ҒдҪ“еӯ— = еЈ¬з”і |з°ЎдҪ“еӯ— = еЈ¬з”і |гғ”гғійҹі = rГ©nshД“n |йҖҡз”Ёгғ”гғійҹі = |жіЁйҹіз¬ҰеҸ· = г„–г„ЈЛҠг„•г„Ј |гғ©гғҶгғіеӯ— = |гӮ«гӮҝгӮ«гғҠ = гғ¬гғігӮ·гӮ§гғјгғі |жјўйҹіиӘӯгҒҝ = гҒҳгӮ“гҒ—гӮ“ |ж…Јз”ЁиӘӯгҒҝ = гҒҝгҒҡгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ
гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn}} }} '''еЈ¬з”і'''пјҲгҒҝгҒҡгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢгҖҒгҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢгҖҒгҒҳгӮ“гҒ—гӮ“пјүгҒҜгҖҒ[[е№Іж”Ҝ]]гҒ®дёҖгҒӨгҖӮ е№Іж”ҜгҒ®зө„гҒҝеҗҲгӮҸгҒӣгҒ®9з•Әзӣ®гҒ§гҖҒеүҚгҒҜ[[иҫӣжңӘ]]гҖҒж¬ЎгҒҜ[[зҷёй…ү]]гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ[[йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢ]]гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒ[[еҚҒе№І]]гҒ®[[еЈ¬]]гҒҜйҷҪгҒ®[[ж°ҙ]]гҖҒ[[еҚҒдәҢж”Ҝ]]гҒ®[[з”і]]гҒҜйҷҪгҒ®[[йҮ‘]]гҒ§гҖҒ [[дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі#зӣёз”ҹпјҲгҒқгҒҶгҒҳгӮҮгҒҶпјү|зӣёз”ҹ]]пјҲйҮ‘з”ҹж°ҙпјүгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®е№ҙ== [[иҘҝжҡҰ]]е№ҙгӮ’60гҒ§еүІгҒЈгҒҰ12гҒҢдҪҷгӮӢе№ҙгҒҢеЈ¬з”ігҒ®[[е№ҙ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮ {| class="wikitable" |+'''еЈ¬з”ігҒ®е№ҙ''' |- ![[1еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]]!![[2еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]]!![[3еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]] |- | *[[12е№ҙ]] *[[72е№ҙ]] *[[132е№ҙ]] *[[192е№ҙ]] *[[252е№ҙ]] *[[312е№ҙ]] *[[372е№ҙ]] *[[432е№ҙ]] *[[492е№ҙ]] *[[552е№ҙ]] *[[612е№ҙ]] *[[672е№ҙ]] *[[732е№ҙ]] *[[792е№ҙ]] *[[852е№ҙ]] *[[912е№ҙ]] *[[972е№ҙ]] | *[[1032е№ҙ]] *[[1092е№ҙ]] *[[1152е№ҙ]] *[[1212е№ҙ]] *[[1272е№ҙ]] *[[1332е№ҙ]] *[[1392е№ҙ]] *[[1452е№ҙ]] *[[1512е№ҙ]] *[[1572е№ҙ]] *[[1632е№ҙ]] *[[1692е№ҙ]] *[[1752е№ҙ]] *[[1812е№ҙ]] *[[1872е№ҙ]] *[[1932е№ҙ]] *[[1992е№ҙ]] | *[[2052е№ҙ]] *[[2112е№ҙ]] *[[2172е№ҙ]] *[[2232е№ҙ]] *[[2292е№ҙ]] *[[2352е№ҙ]] *[[2412е№ҙ]] *[[2472е№ҙ]] *[[2532е№ҙ]] *[[2592е№ҙ]] *[[2652е№ҙ]] *[[2712е№ҙ]] *[[2772е№ҙ]] *[[2832е№ҙ]] *[[2892е№ҙ]] *[[2952е№ҙ]] |} ===еҮәжқҘдәӢ=== *[[еӨ©жҷәеӨ©зҡҮ]]11е№ҙпјҲ672е№ҙпјү - [[еЈ¬з”ігҒ®д№ұ]]гҖӮ *[[жҳҺжІ»]]5е№ҙпјҲ1872е№ҙпјүгҒ«з·ЁиЈҪгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжҲёзұҚгҒҜ[[еЈ¬з”іжҲёзұҚ]]гҒЁе‘јгҒ°гӮҢгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®жңҲ== иҘҝжҡҰе№ҙгҒ®дёӢ1жЎҒгҒҢ4гғ»9пјҲеҚҒе№ІгҒҢ[[з”І]]гғ»[[е·ұ]]пјүгҒ®е№ҙгҒ®[[7жңҲ]]гҒҢеЈ¬з”ігҒ®[[жңҲ (жҡҰ)|жңҲ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮгҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҒ“гҒ“гҒ§гҒ„гҒҶжңҲгҒҜгҖҒ[[ж—§жҡҰ]]гҒ®жңҲгӮ„[[зҜҖжңҲ]]пјҲ[[з«Ӣз§Ӣ]]гҒӢгӮү[[зҷҪйңІ]]гҒ®еүҚж—ҘгҒҫгҒ§пјүгӮ’йҒ©з”ЁгҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲгӮӮгҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—Ҙ== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒ®[[йҒёж—Ҙ]]гҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®йҖҡгӮҠгҖӮ ===йҒёж—Ҙ=== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒҜ[[зҠҜеңҹ|еӨ§еңҹ]]гҒ®3ж—Ҙзӣ®гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”іжҷӮ== 16жҷӮгҒӢгӮү18жҷӮгҒҫгҒ§гӮ’жҢҮгҒҷгҖӮ ==й–ўйҖЈй …зӣ®== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:гҒҝгҒҷгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Monkey-qq]] [[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Monkey-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[en:Yang Water Monkey]][[ja:еЈ¬з”і]]

{{е№Іж”Ҝ}} {{дёӯиҸҜеңҸгҒ®дәӢзү© |гӮҝгӮӨгғҲгғ« = еЈ¬з”і |FileзЁ®еҲҘ = |File = |FileгҒ®иӘ¬жҳҺ = |з№ҒдҪ“еӯ— = еЈ¬з”і |з°ЎдҪ“еӯ— = еЈ¬з”і |гғ”гғійҹі = rГ©nshД“n |йҖҡз”Ёгғ”гғійҹі = |жіЁйҹіз¬ҰеҸ· = г„–г„ЈЛҠг„•г„Ј |гғ©гғҶгғіеӯ— = |гӮ«гӮҝгӮ«гғҠ = гғ¬гғігӮ·гӮ§гғјгғі |жјўйҹіиӘӯгҒҝ = гҒҳгӮ“гҒ—гӮ“ |ж…Јз”ЁиӘӯгҒҝ = гҒҝгҒҡгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ

[[еЈ¬з”ігҒ®д№ұ]]гҖӮ *[[жҳҺжІ»]]5е№ҙпјҲ1872е№ҙпјүгҒ«з·ЁиЈҪгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжҲёзұҚгҒҜ[[еЈ¬з”іжҲёзұҚ]]гҒЁе‘јгҒ°гӮҢгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®жңҲ== иҘҝжҡҰе№ҙгҒ®дёӢ1жЎҒгҒҢ4гғ»9пјҲеҚҒе№ІгҒҢ[[з”І]]гғ»[[е·ұ]]пјүгҒ®е№ҙгҒ®[[7жңҲ]]гҒҢеЈ¬з”ігҒ®[[жңҲ (жҡҰ)|жңҲ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮгҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҒ“гҒ“гҒ§гҒ„гҒҶжңҲгҒҜгҖҒ[[ж—§жҡҰ]]гҒ®жңҲгӮ„[[зҜҖжңҲ]]пјҲ[[з«Ӣз§Ӣ]]гҒӢгӮү[[зҷҪйңІ]]гҒ®еүҚж—ҘгҒҫгҒ§пјүгӮ’йҒ©з”ЁгҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲгӮӮгҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—Ҙ== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒ®[[йҒёж—Ҙ]]гҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®йҖҡгӮҠгҖӮ ===йҒёж—Ҙ=== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒҜ[[зҠҜеңҹ|еӨ§еңҹ]]гҒ®3ж—Ҙзӣ®гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”іжҷӮ== 16жҷӮгҒӢгӮү18жҷӮгҒҫгҒ§гӮ’жҢҮгҒҷгҖӮ ==й–ўйҖЈй …зӣ®== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:гҒҝгҒҷгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Monkey-qq]] [[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Monkey-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:MAINSPACE]] [[en:Yang Water Monkey]][[ja:еЈ¬з”і]]

[[еЈ¬з”ігҒ®д№ұ]]гҖӮ *[[жҳҺжІ»]]5е№ҙпјҲ1872е№ҙпјүгҒ«з·ЁиЈҪгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжҲёзұҚгҒҜ[[еЈ¬з”іжҲёзұҚ]]гҒЁе‘јгҒ°гӮҢгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®жңҲ== иҘҝжҡҰе№ҙгҒ®дёӢ1жЎҒгҒҢ4гғ»9пјҲеҚҒе№ІгҒҢ[[з”І]]гғ»[[е·ұ]]пјүгҒ®е№ҙгҒ®[[7жңҲ]]гҒҢеЈ¬з”ігҒ®[[жңҲ (жҡҰ)|жңҲ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮгҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҒ“гҒ“гҒ§гҒ„гҒҶжңҲгҒҜгҖҒ[[ж—§жҡҰ]]гҒ®жңҲгӮ„[[зҜҖжңҲ]]пјҲ[[з«Ӣз§Ӣ]]гҒӢгӮү[[зҷҪйңІ]]гҒ®еүҚж—ҘгҒҫгҒ§пјүгӮ’йҒ©з”ЁгҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲгӮӮгҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—Ҙ== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒ®[[йҒёж—Ҙ]]гҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®йҖҡгӮҠгҖӮ ===йҒёж—Ҙ=== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒҜ[[зҠҜеңҹ|еӨ§еңҹ]]гҒ®3ж—Ҙзӣ®гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”іжҷӮ== 16жҷӮгҒӢгӮү18жҷӮгҒҫгҒ§гӮ’жҢҮгҒҷгҖӮ ==й–ўйҖЈй …зӣ®== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:гҒҝгҒҷгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Monkey-qq]] [[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Monkey-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:subst:MAINSPACE]] [[en:Yang Water Monkey]][[ja:еЈ¬з”і]]

[[еЈ¬з”ігҒ®д№ұ]]гҖӮ *[[жҳҺжІ»]]5е№ҙпјҲ1872е№ҙпјүгҒ«з·ЁиЈҪгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжҲёзұҚгҒҜ[[еЈ¬з”іжҲёзұҚ]]гҒЁе‘јгҒ°гӮҢгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®жңҲ== иҘҝжҡҰе№ҙгҒ®дёӢ1жЎҒгҒҢ4гғ»9пјҲеҚҒе№ІгҒҢ[[з”І]]гғ»[[е·ұ]]пјүгҒ®е№ҙгҒ®[[7жңҲ]]гҒҢеЈ¬з”ігҒ®[[жңҲ (жҡҰ)|жңҲ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮгҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҒ“гҒ“гҒ§гҒ„гҒҶжңҲгҒҜгҖҒ[[ж—§жҡҰ]]гҒ®жңҲгӮ„[[зҜҖжңҲ]]пјҲ[[з«Ӣз§Ӣ]]гҒӢгӮү[[зҷҪйңІ]]гҒ®еүҚж—ҘгҒҫгҒ§пјүгӮ’йҒ©з”ЁгҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲгӮӮгҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—Ҙ== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒ®[[йҒёж—Ҙ]]гҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®йҖҡгӮҠгҖӮ ===йҒёж—Ҙ=== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒҜ[[зҠҜеңҹ|еӨ§еңҹ]]гҒ®3ж—Ҙзӣ®гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”іжҷӮ== 16жҷӮгҒӢгӮү18жҷӮгҒҫгҒ§гӮ’жҢҮгҒҷгҖӮ ==й–ўйҖЈй …зӣ®== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:гҒҝгҒҷгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Monkey-qq]] [[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Monkey-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[en:Yang Water Monkey]][[ja:еЈ¬з”і]]

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} {{дёӯиҸҜеңҸгҒ®дәӢзү© |гӮҝгӮӨгғҲгғ« = еЈ¬з”і |FileзЁ®еҲҘ = |File = |FileгҒ®иӘ¬жҳҺ = |з№ҒдҪ“еӯ— = еЈ¬з”і |з°ЎдҪ“еӯ— = еЈ¬з”і |гғ”гғійҹі = rГ©nshД“n |йҖҡз”Ёгғ”гғійҹі = |жіЁйҹіз¬ҰеҸ· = г„–г„ЈЛҠг„•г„Ј |гғ©гғҶгғіеӯ— = |гӮ«гӮҝгӮ«гғҠ = гғ¬гғігӮ·гӮ§гғјгғі |жјўйҹіиӘӯгҒҝ = гҒҳгӮ“гҒ—гӮ“ |ж…Јз”ЁиӘӯгҒҝ = гҒҝгҒҡгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ

[[еЈ¬з”ігҒ®д№ұ]]гҖӮ *[[жҳҺжІ»]]5е№ҙпјҲ1872е№ҙпјүгҒ«з·ЁиЈҪгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжҲёзұҚгҒҜ[[еЈ¬з”іжҲёзұҚ]]гҒЁе‘јгҒ°гӮҢгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®жңҲ== иҘҝжҡҰе№ҙгҒ®дёӢ1жЎҒгҒҢ4гғ»9пјҲеҚҒе№ІгҒҢ[[з”І]]гғ»[[е·ұ]]пјүгҒ®е№ҙгҒ®[[7жңҲ]]гҒҢеЈ¬з”ігҒ®[[жңҲ (жҡҰ)|жңҲ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮгҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҒ“гҒ“гҒ§гҒ„гҒҶжңҲгҒҜгҖҒ[[ж—§жҡҰ]]гҒ®жңҲгӮ„[[зҜҖжңҲ]]пјҲ[[з«Ӣз§Ӣ]]гҒӢгӮү[[зҷҪйңІ]]гҒ®еүҚж—ҘгҒҫгҒ§пјүгӮ’йҒ©з”ЁгҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲгӮӮгҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—Ҙ== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒ®[[йҒёж—Ҙ]]гҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®йҖҡгӮҠгҖӮ ===йҒёж—Ҙ=== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒҜ[[зҠҜеңҹ|еӨ§еңҹ]]гҒ®3ж—Ҙзӣ®гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”іжҷӮ== 16жҷӮгҒӢгӮү18жҷӮгҒҫгҒ§гӮ’жҢҮгҒҷгҖӮ ==й–ўйҖЈй …зӣ®== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:гҒҝгҒҷгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Monkey-qq]] [[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Monkey-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Water Monkey]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[en:Yang Water Monkey]][[ja:еЈ¬з”і]]

[[еЈ¬з”ігҒ®д№ұ]]гҖӮ *[[жҳҺжІ»]]5е№ҙпјҲ1872е№ҙпјүгҒ«з·ЁиЈҪгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжҲёзұҚгҒҜ[[еЈ¬з”іжҲёзұҚ]]гҒЁе‘јгҒ°гӮҢгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®жңҲ== иҘҝжҡҰе№ҙгҒ®дёӢ1жЎҒгҒҢ4гғ»9пјҲеҚҒе№ІгҒҢ[[з”І]]гғ»[[е·ұ]]пјүгҒ®е№ҙгҒ®[[7жңҲ]]гҒҢеЈ¬з”ігҒ®[[жңҲ (жҡҰ)|жңҲ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮгҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҒ“гҒ“гҒ§гҒ„гҒҶжңҲгҒҜгҖҒ[[ж—§жҡҰ]]гҒ®жңҲгӮ„[[зҜҖжңҲ]]пјҲ[[з«Ӣз§Ӣ]]гҒӢгӮү[[зҷҪйңІ]]гҒ®еүҚж—ҘгҒҫгҒ§пјүгӮ’йҒ©з”ЁгҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲгӮӮгҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—Ҙ== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒ®[[йҒёж—Ҙ]]гҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®йҖҡгӮҠгҖӮ ===йҒёж—Ҙ=== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒҜ[[зҠҜеңҹ|еӨ§еңҹ]]гҒ®3ж—Ҙзӣ®гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”іжҷӮ== 16жҷӮгҒӢгӮү18жҷӮгҒҫгҒ§гӮ’жҢҮгҒҷгҖӮ ==й–ўйҖЈй …зӣ®== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|гҒҝгҒҷгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Monkey-qq]] [[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Monkey-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Water Monkey]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[en:Yang Water Monkey]][[ja:еЈ¬з”і]]

[[еЈ¬з”ігҒ®д№ұ]]гҖӮ *[[жҳҺжІ»]]5е№ҙпјҲ1872е№ҙпјүгҒ«з·ЁиЈҪгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжҲёзұҚгҒҜ[[еЈ¬з”іжҲёзұҚ]]гҒЁе‘јгҒ°гӮҢгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®жңҲ== иҘҝжҡҰе№ҙгҒ®дёӢ1жЎҒгҒҢ4гғ»9пјҲеҚҒе№ІгҒҢ[[з”І]]гғ»[[е·ұ]]пјүгҒ®е№ҙгҒ®[[7жңҲ]]гҒҢеЈ¬з”ігҒ®[[жңҲ (жҡҰ)|жңҲ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮгҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҒ“гҒ“гҒ§гҒ„гҒҶжңҲгҒҜгҖҒ[[ж—§жҡҰ]]гҒ®жңҲгӮ„[[зҜҖжңҲ]]пјҲ[[з«Ӣз§Ӣ]]гҒӢгӮү[[зҷҪйңІ]]гҒ®еүҚж—ҘгҒҫгҒ§пјүгӮ’йҒ©з”ЁгҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲгӮӮгҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—Ҙ== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒ®[[йҒёж—Ҙ]]гҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®йҖҡгӮҠгҖӮ ===йҒёж—Ҙ=== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒҜ[[зҠҜеңҹ|еӨ§еңҹ]]гҒ®3ж—Ҙзӣ®гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”іжҷӮ== 16жҷӮгҒӢгӮү18жҷӮгҒҫгҒ§гӮ’жҢҮгҒҷгҖӮ ==й–ўйҖЈй …зӣ®== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|гҒҝгҒҷгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Monkey-qq]] [[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Monkey-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Water Monkey]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:subst:MAINSPACE]][[sn:Yang Water Monkey]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Water Monkey]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:MAINSPACE]][[sn:Yang Water Monkey]][[Category:qq]] [[en:Yang Water Monkey]][[ja:еЈ¬з”і]]

[[еЈ¬з”ігҒ®д№ұ]]гҖӮ *[[жҳҺжІ»]]5е№ҙпјҲ1872е№ҙпјүгҒ«з·ЁиЈҪгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжҲёзұҚгҒҜ[[еЈ¬з”іжҲёзұҚ]]гҒЁе‘јгҒ°гӮҢгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®жңҲ== иҘҝжҡҰе№ҙгҒ®дёӢ1жЎҒгҒҢ4гғ»9пјҲеҚҒе№ІгҒҢ[[з”І]]гғ»[[е·ұ]]пјүгҒ®е№ҙгҒ®[[7жңҲ]]гҒҢеЈ¬з”ігҒ®[[жңҲ (жҡҰ)|жңҲ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮгҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҒ“гҒ“гҒ§гҒ„гҒҶжңҲгҒҜгҖҒ[[ж—§жҡҰ]]гҒ®жңҲгӮ„[[зҜҖжңҲ]]пјҲ[[з«Ӣз§Ӣ]]гҒӢгӮү[[зҷҪйңІ]]гҒ®еүҚж—ҘгҒҫгҒ§пјүгӮ’йҒ©з”ЁгҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲгӮӮгҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—Ҙ== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒ®[[йҒёж—Ҙ]]гҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®йҖҡгӮҠгҖӮ ===йҒёж—Ҙ=== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒҜ[[зҠҜеңҹ|еӨ§еңҹ]]гҒ®3ж—Ҙзӣ®гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”іжҷӮ== 16жҷӮгҒӢгӮү18жҷӮгҒҫгҒ§гӮ’жҢҮгҒҷгҖӮ ==й–ўйҖЈй …зӣ®== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|гҒҝгҒҷгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Monkey-qq]] [[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Monkey-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Water Monkey]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]][[sn:Yang Water Monkey]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Water Monkey]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]][[sn:Yang Water Monkey]][[Category:qq]] [[en:Yang Water Monkey]][[ja:еЈ¬з”і]] [[Category:New]]

[[еЈ¬з”ігҒ®д№ұ]]гҖӮ *[[жҳҺжІ»]]5е№ҙпјҲ1872е№ҙпјүгҒ«з·ЁиЈҪгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжҲёзұҚгҒҜ[[еЈ¬з”іжҲёзұҚ]]гҒЁе‘јгҒ°гӮҢгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®жңҲ== иҘҝжҡҰе№ҙгҒ®дёӢ1жЎҒгҒҢ4гғ»9пјҲеҚҒе№ІгҒҢ[[з”І]]гғ»[[е·ұ]]пјүгҒ®е№ҙгҒ®[[7жңҲ]]гҒҢеЈ¬з”ігҒ®[[жңҲ (жҡҰ)|жңҲ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮгҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҒ“гҒ“гҒ§гҒ„гҒҶжңҲгҒҜгҖҒ[[ж—§жҡҰ]]гҒ®жңҲгӮ„[[зҜҖжңҲ]]пјҲ[[з«Ӣз§Ӣ]]гҒӢгӮү[[зҷҪйңІ]]гҒ®еүҚж—ҘгҒҫгҒ§пјүгӮ’йҒ©з”ЁгҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲгӮӮгҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—Ҙ== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒ®[[йҒёж—Ҙ]]гҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®йҖҡгӮҠгҖӮ ===йҒёж—Ҙ=== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒҜ[[зҠҜеңҹ|еӨ§еңҹ]]гҒ®3ж—Ҙзӣ®гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”іжҷӮ== 16жҷӮгҒӢгӮү18жҷӮгҒҫгҒ§гӮ’жҢҮгҒҷгҖӮ ==й–ўйҖЈй …зӣ®== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|гҒҝгҒҷгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Monkey-qq]] [[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Monkey-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Water Monkey]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]][[sn:Yang Water Monkey]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Water Monkey]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]][[sn:Yang Water Monkey]][[Category:qq]] [[en:Yang Water Monkey]][[ja:еЈ¬з”і]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Water Monkey]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yang Water Monkey]]

[[еЈ¬з”ігҒ®д№ұ]]гҖӮ *[[жҳҺжІ»]]5е№ҙпјҲ1872е№ҙпјүгҒ«з·ЁиЈҪгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжҲёзұҚгҒҜ[[еЈ¬з”іжҲёзұҚ]]гҒЁе‘јгҒ°гӮҢгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®жңҲ== иҘҝжҡҰе№ҙгҒ®дёӢ1жЎҒгҒҢ4гғ»9пјҲеҚҒе№ІгҒҢ[[з”І]]гғ»[[е·ұ]]пјүгҒ®е№ҙгҒ®[[7жңҲ]]гҒҢеЈ¬з”ігҒ®[[жңҲ (жҡҰ)|жңҲ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮгҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҒ“гҒ“гҒ§гҒ„гҒҶжңҲгҒҜгҖҒ[[ж—§жҡҰ]]гҒ®жңҲгӮ„[[зҜҖжңҲ]]пјҲ[[з«Ӣз§Ӣ]]гҒӢгӮү[[зҷҪйңІ]]гҒ®еүҚж—ҘгҒҫгҒ§пјүгӮ’йҒ©з”ЁгҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲгӮӮгҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—Ҙ== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒ®[[йҒёж—Ҙ]]гҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®йҖҡгӮҠгҖӮ ===йҒёж—Ҙ=== еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒҜ[[зҠҜеңҹ|еӨ§еңҹ]]гҒ®3ж—Ҙзӣ®гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”іжҷӮ== 16жҷӮгҒӢгӮү18жҷӮгҒҫгҒ§гӮ’жҢҮгҒҷгҖӮ ==й–ўйҖЈй …зӣ®== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|гҒҝгҒҷгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Monkey-qq]] [[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:еЈ¬з”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Monkey-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Water Monkey]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]][[sn:Yang Water Monkey]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Water Monkey]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]][[sn:Yang Water Monkey]][[Category:qq]] [[en:Yang Water Monkey]][[ja:еЈ¬з”і]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Water Monkey]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]][[sn:Yang Water Monkey]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Water Monkey]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Water Monkey]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yang Water Monkey]]

(жҡҰ)|жңҲ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮгҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҒ“гҒ“гҒ§гҒ„гҒҶжңҲгҒҜгҖҒ[[ж—§жҡҰ]]гҒ®жңҲгӮ„[[зҜҖжңҲ]]пјҲ[[з«Ӣз§Ӣ]]гҒӢгӮү[[зҷҪйңІ]]гҒ®еүҚж—ҘгҒҫгҒ§пјүгӮ’йҒ©з”ЁгҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲгӮӮгҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==еЈ¬з”ігҒ®ж—Ҙ== {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} {{дёӯиҸҜеңҸгҒ®дәӢзү© |гӮҝгӮӨгғҲгғ« = еЈ¬з”і |FileзЁ®еҲҘ = |File = |FileгҒ®иӘ¬жҳҺ = |з№ҒдҪ“еӯ— = еЈ¬з”і |з°ЎдҪ“еӯ— = еЈ¬з”і |гғ”гғійҹі = rГ©nshД“n |йҖҡз”Ёгғ”гғійҹі = |жіЁйҹіз¬ҰеҸ· = г„–г„ЈЛҠг„•г„Ј |гғ©гғҶгғіеӯ— = |гӮ«гӮҝгӮ«гғҠ = гғ¬гғігӮ·гӮ§гғјгғі |жјўйҹіиӘӯгҒҝ = гҒҳгӮ“гҒ—гӮ“ |ж…Јз”ЁиӘӯгҒҝ = гҒҝгҒҡгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ
гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn}} }} '''еЈ¬з”і'''пјҲгҒҝгҒҡгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢгҖҒгҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢгҖҒгҒҳгӮ“гҒ—гӮ“пјүгҒҜгҖҒ[[Sexagenary cycle]]гҒ®дёҖгҒӨгҖӮ Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveгҒ®зө„гҒҝеҗҲгӮҸгҒӣгҒ®9з•Әзӣ®гҒ§гҖҒеүҚгҒҜ[[иҫӣжңӘ]]гҖҒж¬ЎгҒҜ[[зҷёй…ү]]гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ[[йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢ]]гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒ[[еҚҒе№І]]гҒ®[[еЈ¬]]гҒҜйҷҪгҒ®[[ж°ҙ]]гҖҒ[[еҚҒдәҢж”Ҝ]]гҒ®[[з”і]]гҒҜйҷҪгҒ®[[йҮ‘]]гҒ§гҖҒ гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn|qq=}} }} '''еЈ¬з”і''' (mizu no esaru, jinsui no saru, jinshin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}. It is the 9th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinwei|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|иҫӣжңӘ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|зҷёй…ү|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=зҷёй…ү|4=zh|5-зҷёй…ү|6=ko|7=кі„мң |lt_ko=кі„мң |8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|qq=}}. гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn|qq=}} }} '''еЈ¬з”і''' (mizu no esaru, jinsui no saru, jinshin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}. It is the 9th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinwei|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|иҫӣжңӘ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|зҷёй…ү|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=зҷёй…ү|4=zh|5-зҷёй…ү|6=ko|7=кі„мң |lt_ko=кі„мң |8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-saru ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-saru ***Onyomi 1: jinshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imsinn (мһ„мӢ ) ** Vietnamese (HГЎn-Viб»Үt): NhГўm ThГўn ==Years of Yang Water ([[:en:672|672 AD]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Jinshin War|Renjin Rebellion]]. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5 ([[:en:1872|1872 AD]]), the family register compiled at that time was called the {{ill|Renjin Family Register|ja|еЈ¬з”іжҲёзұҚ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin Family Register|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin Family Register|qq=}}. ==Months of Yang Water Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|lt=Kinoe (з”І)|2=ja|3=з”І|4=zh|5=з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|lt=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|2=ja|3=е·ұ|4=zh|5=е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Water Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|йҒёж—Ҙ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|qq=}} is the 3rd day of гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn|qq=}} }} '''еЈ¬з”і''' (mizu no esaru, jinsui no saru, jinshin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}. It is the 9th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinwei|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|иҫӣжңӘ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|зҷёй…ү|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=зҷёй…ү|4=zh|5-зҷёй…ү|6=ko|7=кі„мң |lt_ko=кі„мң |8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. ([[:en:672|672 AD]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Jinshin War|Renjin Rebellion]]. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5 ([[:en:1872|1872 AD]]), the family register compiled at that time was called the {{ill|Renjin Family Register|ja|еЈ¬з”іжҲёзұҚ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin Family Register|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin Family Register|qq=}}. ==Months of Yang Water Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|lt=Kinoe (з”І)|2=ja|3=з”І|4=zh|5=з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|lt=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|2=ja|3=е·ұ|4=zh|5=е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Water Monkey== гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn|qq=}} }} '''Yang Water Monkey''' is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to е№Іж”Ҝ}}. It is the 9th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to е№Іж”Ҝ}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinwei|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|иҫӣжңӘ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|зҷёй…ү|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=зҷёй…ү|4=zh|5-зҷёй…ү|6=ko|7=кі„мң |lt_ko=кі„мң |8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. ==Months of Yang Water Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|lt=Kinoe (з”І)|2=ja|3=з”І|4=zh|5=з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|lt=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|2=ja|3=е·ұ|4=zh|5=е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Water Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|йҒёж—Ҙ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the ==Months of Yang Water Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|lt=Kinoe (з”І)|2=ja|3=з”І|4=zh|5=з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|lt=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|2=ja|3=е·ұ|4=zh|5=е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Water Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|йҒёж—Ҙ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hanto|ja|зҠҜеңҹ|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=еӨ§еңҹ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=}}. ==Yang Water Monkey (еЈ¬з”іжҷӮ== It ==Months of Yang Water Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|lt=Kinoe (з”І)|2=ja|3=з”І|4=zh|5=з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|lt=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|2=ja|3=е·ұ|4=zh|5=е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Water Monkey== Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|lt=Kinoe (з”І)|2=ja|3=з”І|4=zh|5=з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Water Monkey== Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|lt=Kinoe (з”І)|2=ja|3=з”І|4=zh|5=з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. called the {{ill|Renjin Family Register|ja|еЈ¬з”іжҲёзұҚ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin Family Register|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin Family Register|qq=|1=jinshin koseki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11429522}}. ==Months of Yang Water Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|lt=Kinoe (з”І)|2=ja|3=з”І|4=zh|5=з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (е·ұ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Water Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water koseki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11429522}}. ==Months of Yang Water Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|lt=Kinoe (з”І)|2=ja|3=з”І|4=zh|5=з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (е·ұ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Water Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|lt=Kinoe (з”І)|2=ja|3=з”І|4=zh|5=з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|lt=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|2=ja|3=е·ұ|4=zh|5=е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Water Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|йҒёж—Ҙ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hanto|ja|зҠҜеңҹ|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=еӨ§еңҹ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn|qq=}} }} '''Yang Water Monkey''' is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 9th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinwei|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|иҫӣжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|зҷёй…ү|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=зҷёй…ү|4=zh|5-зҷёй…ү|6=ko|7=кі„мң |lt_ko=кі„мң |8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Water Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang ==={{nihongo|selection days|йҒёж—Ҙ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn|qq=}} }} '''Yang Water Monkey''' is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 9th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinwei|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|иҫӣжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|зҷёй…ү|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=зҷёй…ү|4=zh|5-зҷёй…ү|6=ko|7=кі„мң |lt_ko=кі„мң |8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Water Monkey== The {{ill|selected {{ill|Kou|ja|з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|lt=Kinoe (з”І)|2=ja|3=з”І|4=zh|5=з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the wikidata|WD=Q11429522}}. ==Months of Yang Water Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|lt=Kinoe (з”І)|2=ja|3=з”І|4=zh|5=з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Water Monkey== The {{ill|selected ==={{nihongo|selection days|йҒёж—Ҙ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hanto|ja|зҠҜеңҹ|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=еӨ§еңҹ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn|qq=}} }} '''Yang Water Monkey''' is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 9th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinwei|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|иҫӣжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|зҷёй…ү|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=зҷёй…ү|4=zh|5-зҷёй…ү|6=ko|7=кі„мң |lt_ko=кі„мң |8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. wikidata|WD=Q11429522}}. ==Months of Yang Water Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|lt=Kinoe (з”І)|2=ja|3=з”І|4=zh|5=з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|lt=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|2=ja|3=е·ұ|4=zh|5=е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Water Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|йҒёж—Ҙ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hanto|ja|зҠҜеңҹ|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=еӨ§еңҹ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. {{ill|Kou|ja|з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|lt=Kinoe (з”І)|2=ja|3=з”І|4=zh|5=з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Water Monkey== The {{ill|selected {{ill|Hanto|ja|зҠҜеңҹ|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=еӨ§еңҹ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn|qq=}} }} '''Yang Water Monkey''' is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 9th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinwei|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|иҫӣжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|зҷёй…ү|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=зҷёй…ү|4=zh|5-зҷёй…ү|6=ko|7=кі„мң |lt_ko=кі„мң |8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. wikidata|WD=Q11429522}}. ==Months of Yang Water Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|lt=Kinoe (з”І)|2=ja|3=з”І|4=zh|5=з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|lt=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|2=ja|3=е·ұ|4=zh|5=е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Water Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|йҒёж—Ҙ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hanto|ja|зҠҜеңҹ|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=еӨ§еңҹ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn|qq=}} }} '''Yang Water Monkey''' is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 9th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinwei|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|иҫӣжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|зҷёй…ү|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=зҷёй…ү|4=zh|5-зҷёй…ү|6=ko|7=кі„мң |lt_ko=кі„мң |8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. Register|ja|еЈ¬з”іжҲёзұҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin Family Register|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin Family Register|1=jinshin koseki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11429522}}. ==Months of Yang Water Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|lt=Kinoe (з”І)|2=ja|3=з”І|4=zh|5=з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|lt=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|2=ja|3=е·ұ|4=zh|5=е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Water Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|йҒёж—Ҙ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hanto|ja|зҠҜеңҹ|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=еӨ§еңҹ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.
