гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn|qq=}} }} '''Yang Water Monkey''' is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 9th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinwei|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|иҫӣжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|зҷёй…ү|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=зҷёй…ү|4=zh|5-зҷёй…ү|6=ko|7=кі„мң |lt_ko=кі„мң |8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. wikidata|WD=Q11429522}}. ==Months of Yang Water Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|lt=Kinoe (з”І)|2=ja|3=з”І|4=zh|5=з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|lt=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|2=ja|3=е·ұ|4=zh|5=е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Water Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang ==={{nihongo|selection days|йҒёж—Ҙ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hanto|ja|зҠҜеңҹ|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=еӨ§еңҹ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. {{ill|Kou|ja|з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|lt=Kinoe (з”І)|2=ja|3=з”І|4=zh|5=з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Water Monkey== The {{ill|selected {{ill|Hanto|ja|зҠҜеңҹ|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=еӨ§еңҹ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn|qq=}} }} '''Yang Water Monkey''' is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 9th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinwei|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|иҫӣжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|зҷёй…ү|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=зҷёй…ү|4=zh|5-зҷёй…ү|6=ko|7=кі„мң |lt_ko=кі„мң |8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. wikidata|WD=Q11429522}}. ==Months of Yang Water Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|lt=Kinoe (з”І)|2=ja|3=з”І|4=zh|5=з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|lt=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|2=ja|3=е·ұ|4=zh|5=е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Water Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang ==={{nihongo|selection days|йҒёж—Ҙ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hanto|ja|зҠҜеңҹ|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=еӨ§еңҹ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn|qq=}} }} '''Yang Water Monkey''' is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 9th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinwei|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|иҫӣжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|зҷёй…ү|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=зҷёй…ү|4=zh|5-зҷёй…ү|6=ko|7=кі„мң |lt_ko=кі„мң |8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. wikidata|WD=Q11429522}}. ==Months of Yang Water Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|lt=Kinoe (з”І)|2=ja|3=з”І|4=zh|5=з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|lt=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|2=ja|3=е·ұ|4=zh|5=е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Water Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang ==={{nihongo|selection days|йҒёж—Ҙ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hanto|ja|зҠҜеңҹ|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=еӨ§еңҹ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn|qq=}} }} '''Yang Water Monkey''' is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 9th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinwei|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|иҫӣжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|зҷёй…ү|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=зҷёй…ү|4=zh|5-зҷёй…ү|6=ko|7=кі„мң |lt_ko=кі„мң |8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. wikidata|WD=Q11429522}}. ==Months of Yang Water Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|lt=Kinoe (з”І)|2=ja|3=з”І|4=zh|5=з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|lt=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|2=ja|3=е·ұ|4=zh|5=е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Water Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang ==={{nihongo|selection days|йҒёж—Ҙ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hanto|ja|зҠҜеңҹ|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=еӨ§еңҹ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. wikidata|WD=Q11429522}}. ==Months of Yang Water Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|lt=Kinoe (з”І)|2=ja|3=з”І|4=zh|5=з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|lt=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|2=ja|3=е·ұ|4=zh|5=е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Water Monkey== The {{ill|selected {{ill|Kou|ja|з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|lt=Kinoe (з”І)|2=ja|3=з”І|4=zh|5=з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Water Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang ==={{nihongo|selection days|йҒёж—Ҙ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hanto|ja|зҠҜеңҹ|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=еӨ§еңҹ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 5 ({{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872 AD}}), the family register compiled at that time was called the {{ill|Renjin Family Register|ja|еЈ¬з”іжҲёзұҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin Family Register|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin Family Register|1=jinshin koseki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11429522}}. ==Months of Yang Water Monkey== In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|lt=Kinoe (з”І)|2=ja|3=з”І|4=zh|5=з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|lt=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|2=ja|3=е·ұ|4=zh|5=е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|July|en|July|WD=Q121|lt=July}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn}} until the day before {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew}}) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Water Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|йҒёж—Ҙ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hanto|ja|зҠҜеңҹ|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=еӨ§еңҹ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==Yang Water Monkey (еЈ¬з”іжҷӮ== It refers to the period from 16:00 to 18:00. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}} гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn|qq=}} }} '''Yang Water Monkey''' is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 9th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinwei|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|иҫӣжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|зҷёй…ү|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=зҷёй…ү|4=zh|5-зҷёй…ү|6=ko|7=кі„мң |lt_ko=кі„мң |8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. Register|ja|еЈ¬з”іжҲёзұҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin Family Register|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin Family Register|1=jinshin koseki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11429522}}. ==Months of Yang Water Monkey== In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|lt=Kinoe (з”І)|2=ja|3=з”І|4=zh|5=з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|lt=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|2=ja|3=е·ұ|4=zh|5=е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|July|en|July|WD=Q121|lt=July}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn}} until the day before {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew}}) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Water Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|йҒёж—Ҙ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hanto|ja|зҠҜеңҹ|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=еӨ§еңҹ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==Yang Water Monkey (еЈ¬з”іжҷӮ== It refers to the period from 16:00 to 18:00. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}} гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn|qq=}} }} '''Yang Water Monkey''' is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 9th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinwei|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|иҫӣжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|зҷёй…ү|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=зҷёй…ү|4=zh|5-зҷёй…ү|6=ko|7=кі„мң |lt_ko=кі„мң |8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|lt=Kinoe (з”І)|2=ja|3=з”І|4=zh|5=з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew}}) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Water Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water days|йҒёж—Ҙ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==Yang Water Monkey (еЈ¬з”іжҷӮ== It refers to the period from 16:00 to 18:00. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}} гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn|qq=}} }} '''Yang Water Monkey''' is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 9th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinwei|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|иҫӣжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|зҷёй…ү|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=зҷёй…ү|4=zh|5-зҷёй…ү|6=ko|7=кі„мң |lt_ko=кі„мң |8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn|qq=}} }} '''Yang Water Monkey''' is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 5 ({{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872 AD|1=1872}}), the family register compiled at that time was called the {{ill|Renjin Family Register|ja|еЈ¬з”іжҲёзұҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin Family Register|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin Family Register|1=jinshin koseki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11429522}}. ==Months of Yang Water Monkey== In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|lt=Kinoe (з”І)|2=ja|3=з”І|4=zh|5=з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (з”І)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|lt=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|2=ja|3=е·ұ|4=zh|5=е·ұ|1=Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (е·ұ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|July|en|July|WD=Q121|lt=July|1=July}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn|1=Liqiu}} until the day before {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew|1=Bailu (solar term)}}) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Water Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|йҒёж—Ҙ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hanto|ja|зҠҜеңҹ|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=еӨ§еңҹ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==Yang Water Monkey (еЈ¬з”іжҷӮ== It refers to the period from 16:00 to 18:00. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}} гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn|qq=}} }} '''Yang Water Monkey''' is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 9th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinwei|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|иҫӣжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|зҷёй…ү|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=зҷёй…ү|4=zh|5-зҷёй…ү|6=ko|7=кі„мң |lt_ko=кі„мң |8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|з”І|1=Kinoe (з”І)|lt=Kinoe (з”І)|2=ja|3=з”І|4=zh|5=з”І|1=Kinoe of {{ill|July|en|July|WD=Q121|lt=July|1=July}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew|1=Bailu (solar term)}}) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Water Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected days|йҒёж—Ҙ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|еЈ¬з”і|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water гҒҳгӮ“гҒҷгҒ„гҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ |гҒІгӮүгҒҢгҒӘ = |йҹ“еӣҪиӘһ = мһ„мӢ  |гғҷгғҲгғҠгғ иӘһ = {{Unicode|NhГўm ThГўn|qq=}} }} '''Yang Water Monkey''' is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 9th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinwei|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|иҫӣжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|зҷёй…ү|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=зҷёй…ү|4=zh|5-зҷёй…ү|6=ko|7=кі„мң |lt_ko=кі„мң |8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five
